testcase.name: Login Flow › should login as admin
Login Flow › should login as operator
Login Flow › should login as anggota
Login Flow › should login as perusahaan

testcase.name: Sidebar Navigation › admin role › should load content for each main menu
Sidebar Navigation › admin role › should expand and load Simpanan sub-menus
Sidebar Navigation › admin role › should expand and load Pinjaman sub-menus

testcase.name: Sidebar Navigation › operator role › should load content for each main menu
Sidebar Navigation › operator role › should expand and load Simpanan sub-menus
Sidebar Navigation › operator role › should expand and load Pinjaman sub-menus
Sidebar Navigation › anggota role › should display all core sidebar menus
testcase.system-out: ✓ Optional menu found: Sewa Aset Koperasi ✓ Optional menu found: Loket PPOB & Pulsa ✓ Optional menu found: Virtual Account Deposit ✓ Optional menu found: Kredit Cicilan Pengadaan

testcase.name: Sidebar Navigation › anggota role › should load content for each main menu
Sidebar Navigation › perusahaan role › should display all core sidebar menus
Sidebar Navigation › perusahaan role › should load content for each main menu
Smoke Tests - Critical Paths › admin can access dashboard and key modules
Smoke Tests - Critical Paths › anggota can access dashboard and savings
Smoke Tests - Critical Paths › login page has quick login buttons
